title: Spicy Juicy Irish Pork Curry
description: A fiery, protein-packed Irish-style curry thats perfect for fueling a post-workout recovery, featuring tender ground pork, aromatic herbs, and a hint of whiskey.

ingredients.name: Ground pork
ingredients.notes: use lean, halal certified if available

instructions: Heat the vegetable oil in a large saucepan over medium heat.
Add the diced onion and sauté until translucent, about 4 minutes.
Stir in the minced garlic and ginger, cooking for 30 seconds until fragrant.
Add the ground pork, breaking it up with a spoon; cook until browned and fully cooked to 71°C (160°F), about 8 minutes.
Sprinkle in the smoked paprika, cumin, coriander, cayenne pepper, and salt; stir well for 1 minute.
Pour in the diced tomatoes (and whiskey, if using) and bring to a gentle simmer for 5 minutes.
Reduce heat to low, whisk in the plain yogurt, and gently simmer for 5 minutes, ensuring the yogurt does not curdle.
If the curry is too thick, add a splash of water to reach desired consistency; simmer another 2 minutes.
Serve hot, garnished with fresh parsley if desired.
